headline: Teradyne (TER) Is Down 6.2% After AI-Fueled Q4 Surge And 2026 Outlook Update - What's Changed
summary: In the past few days, Teradyne reported Q4 2025 revenue of US$1.08 billion, up 44% year-over-year, driven by strong AI-related semiconductor test demand and sequential growth across all segments, while also presenting its outlook at the 2026 Cantor Global Technology & Industrial Growth Conference in New York. The most material takeaway is how Teradyne’s semiconductor test and robotics businesses are increasingly tied to capital spending on AI data centers and automation, reinforcing its role...

headline: Adobe Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y, Shares Fall
summary: ADBE tops fiscal Q1 estimates with $6.06 EPS and $6.4 billion in revenues as subscription sales jump 13%, but the stock falls despite an upbeat fiscal Q2 outlook.
